description_long: This cabin features a modern, open design with two large, gabled roof sections connected by a central open-air deck. The structure is primarily constructed from wood, with visible timber railings, posts, and stairs, complemented by a dark metal or shingle roof. Large windows line the main enclosed section, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The cabin includes multiple staircases and a spacious wraparound porch, providing elevated access and outdoor seating areas. The overall layout is elongated, with the main entrance under a covered porch and a secondary stairway leading to the deck. The architectural style blends rustic elements with contemporary lines, making it suitable for both urban and natural settings.
description: A modern, elongated wooden cabin with two gabled roofs, large windows, and a spacious wraparound porch connected by open staircases. The design combines rustic timber elements with contemporary architectural features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance under a covered porch, central open deck, and staircases leading up to the porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, two gabled roof sections, and the extensive wraparound porch with railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the roof and a secondary stairway, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open deck, porch railings, and the connection between the two main roof sections.
attribute_roof_type: dual gable roof with deep overhangs and visible shingle or metal cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple large rectangular windows arranged in a row along the main enclosed section, symmetrically grouped on the facade facing the deck
attribute_door_placement: one main exterior door centered under the front porch, with additional access via staircases leading to the deck
